title: ononis reclinata subsp. dentata
intro: Ononis reclinata subsp. dentata, also known as Burmede or Spurred Restharrow, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues.
